items.title: Critically appraised papers: Adding physiotherapy or motivational text messages does not improve pain beyond home exercise alone for degenerative meniscal tear and knee pain [commentary].
items.summary: A commentary suggests that adding physiotherapy or motivational text messages does not improve pain outcomes beyond home exercise alone for degenerative meniscal tear and knee pain.
items.curatedReason: 运动疗法对退行性半月板撕裂和膝关节疼痛的非劣效性再次得到确认。这意味着你完全可以将居家运动作为一线方案，不必过度依赖额外的物理治疗干预，尤其是对于那些门诊依从性不高的患者。
items.titleZh: 评论：对于退行性半月板撕裂和膝关节疼痛，额外物理治疗或激励短信在改善疼痛方面不优于单独居家运动。
items.summaryZh: 一篇评论指出，对于退行性半月板撕裂和膝关节疼痛，在居家运动基础上增加物理治疗或激励短信，并不能进一步改善疼痛。
items.curatedReasonEn: The non-inferiority of exercise therapy for degenerative meniscal tears and knee pain has been re-confirmed. You can confidently use home exercise as a first-line approach, reducing reliance on additional physical therapy interventions, especially for patients with low clinic adherence.
items.limitation: 这是一篇评论，对原始研究的细节未做深入阐述。
items.limitationEn: This is a commentary, and detailed specifics of the original study are not elaborated.

items.title: Critically appraised paper: Mobile-based pulmonary rehabilitation improved exercise capacity as much as and health status more than centre-based pulmonary rehabilitation for chronic obstructive pulmonary disease [commentary].
items.summary: A commentary indicates that mobile-based pulmonary rehabilitation improved exercise capacity as much as and health status more than center-based pulmonary rehabilitation for COPD.
items.curatedReason: 针对慢性阻塞性肺疾病（COPD）患者，移动端肺康复在运动能力改善方面与中心化康复效果相当，且对健康状况的改善更优。这意味着远程医疗模型在心肺康复领域具有巨大潜力，为患者提供了更便捷、可能更有效的方案。
items.titleZh: 批判性评估论文：移动端肺康复对慢性阻塞性肺疾病的运动能力改善与中心化康复相当，且健康状况改善更优。
items.summaryZh: 一项评述文章指出，针对慢性阻塞性肺疾病（COPD），移动端肺康复在改善运动能力方面与中心化康复效果相同，但在改善健康状况方面表现更优。
items.curatedReasonEn: For COPD patients, mobile-based pulmonary rehabilitation is as effective as center-based rehabilitation in improving exercise capacity and superior in improving health status. This highlights the significant potential of telehealth models in cardiopulmonary rehabilitation, offering patients a more convenient and potentially more effective option.
items.limitation: 本研究为评述性质，并非原始研究，其结论基于对原始研究的批判性评估。
items.limitationEn: This is a commentary, not an original study, and its conclusions are based on a critical appraisal of an original paper.

items.title: Efficacy of High-Intensity Laser Therapy for Meralgia Paresthetica: A Randomized, Double-Blind, Sham-Controlled Trial.
items.summary: A randomized, double-blind, sham-controlled trial (n=54) demonstrated that High-Intensity Laser Therapy (HILT) significantly improved pain (NPRS, P=0.006), function (LEFS, P=0.043), and nerve conduction velocity (P=0.027) at 12 weeks for Meralgia Paresthetica.
items.titleZh: 高强度激光治疗股外侧皮神经卡压性股痛的疗效：一项随机、双盲、假对照试验。
items.summaryZh: 一项随机、双盲、假对照试验（n=54）表明，高强度激光治疗（HILT）在 12 周时显著改善了股外侧皮神经卡压性股痛患者的疼痛（NPRS, P=0.006）、功能（LEFS, P=0.043）和神经传导速度（P=0.027）。
items.curatedReasonEn: This RCT strongly supports the efficacy of High-Intensity Laser Therapy (HILT) for Meralgia Paresthetica (MP). In clinical practice, you can incorporate HILT into MP patient treatment plans to significantly improve pain, function, and nerve conduction velocity.
items.limitation: 研究随访期相对较短（12 周），长期效果尚待验证，且未报告激光治疗的具体疼痛缓解量。
items.limitationEn: The study's follow-up period is relatively short (12 weeks), long-term effects need further validation, and specific pain relief amounts from laser therapy were not reported.
items.journal: American journal of physical medicine & rehabilitation

items.title: Management of Labral Tears Associated with Glenohumeral Instability in Athletes.
items.summary: A review examines current literature on the evaluation and management of labral pathology with associated glenohumeral instability in athletes, focusing on rehabilitation and return to sport.
items.curatedReason: 针对运动员肩盂唇撕裂伴盂肱关节不稳的康复和重返运动策略正在演进。你需要密切关注术后时间、骨量丢失阈值以及修复技术进展，这会直接影响你的康复方案制定和重返运动决策。
items.titleZh: 运动员盂肱关节不稳相关盂唇撕裂的治疗。
items.summaryZh: 一篇综述探讨了运动员盂肱关节不稳相关盂唇撕裂的评估和治疗的最新文献，重点关注康复和重返运动。
items.curatedReasonEn: Rehabilitation and return-to-sport strategies for glenoid labral tears with glenohumeral instability in athletes are evolving. You need to closely follow advancements in postoperative timing, critical bone loss thresholds, and surgical repair techniques, as these directly influence your rehabilitation planning and return-to-sport decisions.
items.limitation: 作为综述性文章，其证据强度取决于所引用研究的质量，而非原创性数据。
items.limitationEn: As a review article, its evidence strength depends on the quality of cited studies, not original data.

items.title: "Are Cardiac Rehabilitation Programs Effective in Improving Aerobic Capacity for People with Transient Ischemic Attack and Stroke? A Rapid Review and Meta-analysis".
items.summary: A rapid review and meta-analysis (9 studies, n=490) found that cardiac rehabilitation improved aerobic capacity by 28m (95% CI 16m to 39m, P<0.00001) for people with stroke or TIA, along with promising improvements in systolic blood pressure and self-reported diet.
items.curatedReason: 这项快速综述和 Meta 分析显示，心脏康复对卒中或短暂性脑缺血发作（TIA）患者改善有氧能力（平均增加 28 米的 6 分钟步行距离）是有效的。这意味着你可以将心脏康复作为这类神经功能障碍患者改善心血管健康的可靠干预手段，并可以改善血压和自我报告饮食。
items.titleZh: “心脏康复项目是否有效改善短暂性脑缺血发作和卒中患者的有氧能力？一项快速综述和 Meta 分析”。
items.summaryZh: 一项快速综述和 Meta 分析（9 项研究，n=490）发现，心脏康复项目可有效改善卒中或短暂性脑缺血发作患者的有氧能力（平均增加 28 米，95% CI 16 米至 39 米，P<0.00001），并有望改善收缩压和自我报告饮食。
items.curatedReasonEn: This rapid review and meta-analysis indicates that cardiac rehabilitation is effective in improving aerobic capacity (mean increase of 28 meters in 6-minute walk distance) for stroke or TIA patients. This means you can consider cardiac rehabilitation a reliable intervention for these neurologically impaired patients to improve cardiovascular health, blood pressure, and self-reported diet.
items.limitation: 纳入研究的质量普遍较低至中等，且 meta 分析中仅纳入了三项研究，可能影响结果的稳健性。
items.limitationEn: The included studies were generally of low to moderate quality, and only three studies were included in the meta-analysis, which may affect the robustness of the results.
items.journal: American journal of physical medicine & rehabilitation

items.title: Effectiveness of physical therapy techniques and methods in the management of endometriosis symptoms: A systematic review with meta-analysis.
items.summary: A systematic review with meta-analysis evaluates the effectiveness of physical therapy techniques and methods in managing endometriosis symptoms.
items.curatedReason: 这项系统综述和 Meta 分析确认了物理治疗技术在改善子宫内膜异位症症状方面的有效性。当你在处理这类患者时，可以更有信心地运用物理治疗手段，将其作为综合管理方案的一部分。
items.titleZh: 物理治疗技术和方法在子宫内膜异位症症状管理中的有效性：一项系统综述和 Meta 分析。
items.summaryZh: 一项系统综述和 Meta 分析评估了物理治疗技术和方法在改善子宫内膜异位症症状方面的有效性。
items.curatedReasonEn: This systematic review and meta-analysis confirms the effectiveness of physical therapy techniques in improving endometriosis symptoms. When managing these patients, you can more confidently apply physical therapy as part of a comprehensive management plan.
items.limitation: 研究未明确指出具体的物理治疗技术和方法，以及各类方法间的相对有效性。
items.limitationEn: The study does not specify particular physical therapy techniques and methods, nor their relative effectiveness.

items.title: Perspectives on an advanced practice physiotherapy-led model for musculoskeletal care in Canada: A qualitative study of patients and multidisciplinary clinicians.
items.summary: A qualitative study explored perspectives on an Advanced Practice Physiotherapy (APP)-led musculoskeletal care model in Canada, identifying systemic barriers despite its promise.
items.curatedReason: 高级执业物理治疗（APP）模式是解决肌肉骨骼疾病负担的有效途径。加拿大虽有成功实践，但推广仍面临系统性障碍。你可关注当地监管及政策动态，因为跨专业协作和患者接受度是这类模式成功的关键。
items.titleZh: 加拿大高级执业物理治疗师主导的肌肉骨骼护理模式：患者和多学科临床医生的定性研究视角。
items.summaryZh: 一项定性研究探讨了加拿大高级执业物理治疗师（APP）主导的肌肉骨骼护理模式，尽管该模式前景良好，但仍面临系统性障碍。
items.curatedReasonEn: The Advanced Practice Physiotherapy (APP) model is an effective way to address the burden of musculoskeletal conditions. While successful in Canada, systemic barriers hinder its wider adoption. Monitor local regulatory and policy developments, as interprofessional collaboration and patient acceptance are crucial for the success of such models.
items.limitation: 定性研究，结果可能受访谈对象的选择和解释偏倚影响，外推性有限。
items.limitationEn: Qualitative study, results may be influenced by selection and interpretation bias from interviewees, limiting generalizability.

items.title: Manual therapy promotes prefrontal neural efficiency in chronic non-specific neck pain: An fNIRS-Based randomized controlled trial.
items.summary: A randomized controlled trial (n=30) suggests that manual therapy combined with exercise promotes prefrontal neural efficiency in chronic non-specific neck pain, improving pain and disability.
items.curatedReason: 这项小样本 RCT 提示，手法治疗结合运动可能通过改善前额叶神经效率来减轻慢性非特异性颈痛。如果你在使用手法治疗，这项研究提供了初步的神经生理学机制支持，但还需要更大规模的研究来验证。
items.titleZh: 手法治疗可提升慢性非特异性颈痛患者的前额叶神经效率：一项基于 fNIRS 的随机对照试验。
items.summaryZh: 一项随机对照试验（n=30）表明，手法治疗结合运动可提高慢性非特异性颈痛患者的前额叶神经效率，从而改善疼痛和残疾。
items.curatedReasonEn: This small-sample RCT suggests that manual therapy combined with exercise may alleviate chronic non-specific neck pain by improving prefrontal neural efficiency. If you use manual therapy, this study provides preliminary neurophysiological mechanism support, but larger studies are needed for validation.
items.limitation: 样本量较小（n=30），且随访期有限，可能影响结果的普遍性和长期有效性。
items.limitationEn: Small sample size (n=30) and limited follow-up period may affect the generalizability and long-term efficacy of the results.

items.title: Development of a predictive model for postoperative erectile function recovery in male patients with incomplete traumatic cervical spinal cord injury.
items.summary: A retrospective cohort study (n=207) developed a clinical prediction model for postoperative erectile function recovery in male patients with incomplete traumatic cervical spinal cord injury.
items.curatedReason: 这份预测模型为不完全性创伤性颈脊髓损伤（iCSCI）男性患者术后勃起功能恢复提供了有价值的参考。在对这类患者进行康复评估和咨询时，你可以参考这些预测因子，为患者提供更个性化的预期管理。
items.titleZh: 不完全性创伤性颈脊髓损伤男性患者术后勃起功能恢复预测模型的开发。
items.summaryZh: 一项回顾性队列研究（n=207）开发了一个临床预测模型，用于预测不完全性创伤性颈脊髓损伤男性患者术后勃起功能恢复。
items.curatedReasonEn: This predictive model offers valuable insights into postoperative erectile function recovery in male patients with incomplete traumatic cervical spinal cord injury (iCSCI). When assessing and counseling these patients for rehabilitation, you can use these predictors to provide more personalized expectation management.
items.limitation: 回顾性队列研究，可能存在回顾偏倚，且模型需在独立外部队列中进行验证。
items.limitationEn: Retrospective cohort study, potential for recall bias, and the model requires external validation in an independent cohort.
items.journal: European spine journal : official publication of the European Spine Society, the European Spinal Deformity Society, and the European Section of the Cervical Spine Research Society

items.title: Implementing Live Long Walk Strong: Practice-based evidence on adapting a physical therapy program across diverse contexts.
items.summary: A process evaluation (n=11 PTs/PTAs) described the adaptation of the "Live Long Walk Strong" physical therapy program for older adults across four diverse clinical settings within the Veterans Health Administration.
items.curatedReason: “Live Long Walk Strong”项目在多种老年康复环境中成功实施，其经验表明，要提高项目的可及性，适应性调整至关重要。这意味着你在引入新项目时，需要重点关注如何根据自身实践场景（如门诊、SNF 或远程医疗）对方案进行灵活调整。
items.titleZh: “活得久走得稳”项目的实施：在不同背景下调整物理治疗实践的证据。
items.summaryZh: 一项过程评估（n=11 位物理治疗师/助理）描述了“活得久走得稳”这一针对老年人的物理治疗项目在美国退伍军人健康管理局下属四个不同临床环境中的适应性调整。
items.curatedReasonEn: The "Live Long Walk Strong" program's successful implementation across various geriatric rehabilitation settings demonstrates the critical role of adaptive adjustments for program accessibility. This means when introducing new programs, you should focus on how to flexibly adapt the plan to your specific practice context (e.g., outpatient, SNF, or telehealth).
items.limitation: 过程评估研究，而非结局效果研究，未提供具体的临床疗效数据。
items.limitationEn: This is a process evaluation study, not an outcome effectiveness study, and does not provide specific clinical efficacy data.
items.journal: PM & R : the journal of injury, function, and rehabilitation

items.title: Physiotherapy management of Long-COVID: an evidence-based approach.
items.summary: A review describes the evidence-based physiotherapy management of Long-COVID, addressing its heterogenous, episodic, and multisystemic nature.
items.curatedReason: 长新冠的物理治疗管理仍缺乏统一指南，但基于现有证据，多系统症状需要个性化的干预策略。你应该关注呼吸、心血管、神经、肌肉骨骼等多个维度的评估，并针对性地进行运动耐量、疲劳管理、功能训练等干预。
items.titleZh: 长新冠的物理治疗管理：一种基于证据的方法。
items.summaryZh: 一篇综述描述了基于证据的长新冠物理治疗管理方法，以应对其异质性、偶发性和多系统性特点。
items.curatedReasonEn: Long-COVID physiotherapy management still lacks unified guidelines, but based on existing evidence, multi-system symptoms require personalized intervention strategies. You should focus on multi-dimensional assessments covering respiratory, cardiovascular, neurological, and musculoskeletal aspects, and tailor interventions for exercise tolerance, fatigue management, and functional training.
items.limitation: 作为综述性文章，证据强度受限于所引用文献的质量和异质性。
items.limitationEn: As a review article, the strength of evidence is limited by the quality and heterogeneity of the cited literature.

items.title: Investigation of the Effectiveness of Extracorporeal Shock Wave Therapy and Kinesiotaping in Individuals With Carpal Tunnel Syndrome: A Randomized Controlled Trial.
items.summary: A randomized controlled trial (n=54) investigated the efficacy of extracorporeal shock wave therapy (ESWT) and kinesiotaping (KT) as adjuncts to wrist splinting and nerve-tendon gliding exercises for mild to moderate carpal tunnel syndrome.
items.curatedReason: 这项 RCT 提示体外冲击波疗法（ESWT）和肌内效贴（KT）可以作为腕管综合征（CTS）的辅助治疗手段。如果你在常规夹板和神经-肌腱滑动练习基础上，想为轻中度 CTS 患者提供更多干预，ESWT 结合 KT 是一个值得考虑的选项。
items.titleZh: 体外冲击波疗法和肌内效贴在腕管综合征患者中的有效性研究：一项随机对照试验。
items.summaryZh: 一项随机对照试验（n=54）研究了体外冲击波疗法（ESWT）和肌内效贴（KT）作为腕管综合征（CTS）常规治疗（夹板和神经-肌腱滑动练习）的辅助手段的有效性。
items.curatedReasonEn: This RCT suggests that Extracorporeal Shock Wave Therapy (ESWT) and Kinesiotaping (KT) can serve as adjunctive treatments for Carpal Tunnel Syndrome (CTS). If you're looking to provide additional interventions for mild to moderate CTS patients beyond conventional splinting and nerve-tendon gliding exercises, ESWT combined with KT is an option worth considering.
items.limitation: 研究未详细报告各组治疗后的具体效果量，如 VAS 疼痛评分的具体下降值或 Boston 腕管问卷评分变化。
items.limitationEn: The study did not report specific effect sizes after treatment for each group, such as the exact decrease in VAS pain scores or changes in Boston Carpal Tunnel Questionnaire scores.
items.journal: American journal of physical medicine & rehabilitation

items.title: Appropriate translational designs for determining causal force-based (manual therapy) treatment mechanisms.
items.summary: A commentary outlines appropriate translational designs for determining causal force-based (manual therapy) treatment mechanisms, identifying five such designs.
items.curatedReason: 了解手法治疗的因果机制是本领域的关键进展。这篇评论总结了五种设计，帮你设计或评估手法治疗研究时，能更精准地揭示“为何”有效，而不是停留在“是否”有效的层面。
items.titleZh: 旨在确定基于力（手法治疗）的治疗因果机制的适当转化研究设计。
items.summaryZh: 一篇评论概述了旨在确定基于力（手法治疗）的治疗因果机制的适当转化研究设计，并提出了五种设计类型。
items.curatedReasonEn: Understanding the causal mechanisms of manual therapy is a key advancement in this field. This commentary summarizes five research designs, helping you to more precisely uncover 'why' manual therapy works, rather than just 'whether' it works, when designing or evaluating studies.
items.limitation: 作为评论性文章，未提供具体的研究数据或实证结果。
items.limitationEn: As a commentary, it does not provide specific research data or empirical results.

items.title: Effect of Visceral Manipulation Versus Integrated Neuromuscular Inhibition Technique in Shoulder Impingement Syndrome.
items.summary: A randomized controlled trial (n=75) found Visceral Manipulation (VM) and Integrated Neuromuscular Inhibition Technique (INIT) to have similar effects on pain, function, and ROM in shoulder impingement syndrome with upper trapezius trigger points.
items.curatedReason: 这项 RCT 提示内脏筋膜松动术（VM）与整合神经肌肉抑制技术（INIT）在肩峰撞击综合征的疼痛、功能和活动度改善上效果相似。如果你在临床中遇到肩峰撞击患者，特别是伴有斜方肌触发点时，可考虑将 VM 作为一种潜在的辅助干预手段。
items.titleZh: 内脏筋膜松动术与整合神经肌肉抑制技术对肩峰撞击综合征的效果比较。
items.summaryZh: 一项随机对照试验（n=75）发现，内脏筋膜松动术（VM）与整合神经肌肉抑制技术（INIT）在改善伴有上斜方肌触发点的肩峰撞击综合征患者的疼痛、功能和活动度方面效果相似。
items.curatedReasonEn: This RCT suggests that visceral manipulation (VM) and integrated neuromuscular inhibition technique (INIT) have similar effects on pain, function, and ROM in shoulder impingement syndrome. If you treat shoulder impingement patients, especially with trapezius trigger points, consider VM as a potential adjunctive intervention.
items.limitation: 研究人群限定为 20-40 岁，且关注上斜方肌触发点，结果外推到其他年龄段或无触发点患者需谨慎。
items.limitationEn: The study population is limited to 20-40 years old, focusing on upper trapezius trigger points, so generalizing to other age groups or patients without trigger points should be done cautiously.
items.journal: Physiotherapy research international : the journal for researchers and clinicians in physical therapy

items.title: Multidimensional factors associated with community reintegration in the early chronic phase after stroke: the role of fear-related activity avoidance.
items.summary: A cross-sectional study (n=40) identified multidimensional factors, particularly fear-related activity avoidance, as key to community reintegration in the early chronic phase after stroke.
items.curatedReason: 卒中后早期慢性期的社区回归受多维度因素影响，尤其是与恐惧相关的活动回避。你应该在评估和干预时着重识别和处理患者的恐惧回避行为，这对于提升他们的社区参与度至关重要。
items.titleZh: 卒中后早期慢性期社区回归的多维度影响因素：恐惧相关活动回避的作用。
items.summaryZh: 一项横断面研究（n=40）发现，在卒中后早期慢性期，与恐惧相关的活动回避是影响社区回归的关键多维度因素。
items.curatedReasonEn: Community reintegration in the early chronic phase post-stroke is influenced by multidimensional factors, especially fear-related activity avoidance. You should prioritize identifying and addressing fear-avoidance behaviors during assessment and intervention, as this is crucial for improving community participation.
items.limitation: 横断面研究设计无法建立因果关系，且样本量较小（n=40），限制了结果的泛化性。
items.limitationEn: Cross-sectional study design cannot establish causality, and the small sample size (n=40) limits the generalizability of the results.

items.title: Between the Snap and the Return: A Prospective Narrative Analysis of Four Voices from inside Anterior Cruciate Ligament Reconstruction Recovery.
items.summary: A prospective narrative analysis (n=4) explored patients' evolving experiences of ACL injury and recovery from injury to self-defined rehabilitation goals.
items.curatedReason: ACL 重建术后恢复不仅是生理过程，更是复杂心理体验。这篇定性研究揭示了患者从受伤到重返运动过程中的动态叙事。在临床实践中，你应该更关注患者的心理变化和叙事，提供个性化的心理支持和康复目标设定。
items.titleZh: 从受伤到重返赛场：前交叉韧带重建术后恢复的四种叙事视角。
items.summaryZh: 一项前瞻性叙事分析（n=4）探讨了患者从受伤到实现康复目标，前交叉韧带（ACL）重建术后康复过程中的动态体验。
items.curatedReasonEn: ACL reconstruction recovery is a complex psychological journey, not just a physiological process. This qualitative study reveals the dynamic narrative of patients from injury to return to sport. In clinical practice, you should pay more attention to patients' psychological changes and narratives, providing personalized psychological support and rehabilitation goal setting.
items.limitation: 定性研究，样本量小（n=4），结果的普遍性有限，主要为深入理解个体经验。
items.limitationEn: Qualitative study with a small sample size (n=4), limiting the generalizability of results, primarily providing in-depth understanding of individual experiences.

items.title: Toward Precision Cardiac Rehabilitation: Current Limitations and Future Opportunities of Omics and Artificial Intelligence.
items.summary: A review discusses the current limitations and future opportunities of omics and artificial intelligence in advancing precision cardiac rehabilitation.
items.curatedReason: 精准心脏康复是未来方向，它将通过整合组学和人工智能（AI）实现更个性化的干预。虽然目前仍处于概念阶段，但你可以开始关注这些技术在数据收集和分析方面的潜在应用，为未来临床实践的变革做准备。
items.titleZh: 迈向精准心脏康复：组学与人工智能的当前局限与未来机遇。
items.summaryZh: 一篇综述探讨了组学与人工智能在推进精准心脏康复方面的当前局限性与未来机遇。
items.curatedReasonEn: Precision cardiac rehabilitation is the future, aiming for more personalized interventions through integrating omics and AI. While still conceptual, you can start following the potential applications of these technologies in data collection and analysis, preparing for future clinical practice changes.
items.limitation: 作为展望性文章，内容多为概念和潜力探讨，缺乏当前的实证数据支持。
items.limitationEn: As a prospective article, the content mainly discusses concepts and potential, lacking current empirical data support.

items.title: Accuracy of visual estimation of shoulder abduction by expert physiotherapists: a comparative study using 3D motion capture.
items.summary: A comparative study found that expert physiotherapists' visual estimation of shoulder abduction showed discrepancies with 3D motion capture.
items.curatedReason: 虽然临床实践中目测评估肩关节活动度很常见，但研究显示其准确性与 3D 运动捕捉系统存在差异。你应该继续在需要高精度评估的场景中使用客观测量工具，避免单纯依赖经验性目测。
items.titleZh: 专家物理治疗师目测肩关节外展准确性：一项与 3D 运动捕捉对比研究。
items.summaryZh: 一项对比研究发现，专家物理治疗师目测肩关节外展角度的准确性与 3D 运动捕捉结果存在差异。
items.curatedReasonEn: While visual estimation of shoulder range of motion is common in clinical practice, this study shows discrepancies with 3D motion capture. You should continue to use objective measurement tools in situations requiring high-precision assessment, avoiding sole reliance on empirical visual estimation.
items.limitation: 研究样本量小，且仅限于健康受试者，对病理状态下的外推性有限。
items.limitationEn: The study has a small sample size and is limited to healthy participants, limiting generalizability to pathological conditions.

items.title: Low Back Pain: A Review.
items.summary: A review defines low back pain, discusses its global prevalence affecting approximately 619 million people, and distinguishes between acute, subacute, and chronic classifications, with 90% being nonspecific.
items.curatedReason: 这篇综述提供了关于腰痛的流行病学、分类和非特异性腰痛的定义。它可以作为你向患者解释腰痛病程和预后的基础参考，但没有提供具体的干预策略或实践改变。
items.titleZh: 腰痛：一篇综述。
items.summaryZh: 一篇综述定义了腰痛，讨论了其全球流行率（影响约 6.19 亿人），并区分了急性、亚急性和慢性分类，其中 90% 为非特异性腰痛。
items.curatedReasonEn: This review provides an overview of low back pain epidemiology, classification, and definition of non-specific low back pain. It can serve as a basic reference when explaining the course and prognosis of low back pain to patients, but it does not offer specific intervention strategies or practice changes.
items.limitation: 综述内容侧重于流行病学和定义，未深入探讨具体的物理治疗干预方法和效果。
items.limitationEn: The review focuses on epidemiology and definitions, without in-depth discussion of specific physical therapy interventions and their effects.

items.title: Experiences and coping with kinesiophobia in patients with post-stroke limb dysfunction: a qualitative study.
items.summary: A qualitative study explored the experiences, coping strategies, and support needs related to kinesiophobia in 15 stroke survivors with limb dysfunction, identifying themes like fear development and distorted body perception.
items.curatedReason: 卒中后运动恐惧（kinesiophobia）是康复的常见障碍，本定性研究深入描绘了患者的经历和应对方式。在临床中，除了关注身体功能，更要主动识别并解决患者的运动恐惧，提供心理支持和恰当的教育。
items.titleZh: 卒中后肢体功能障碍患者运动恐惧的经历与应对：一项定性研究
items.summaryZh: 一项定性研究探讨了 15 名卒中后肢体功能障碍患者运动恐惧的经历、应对策略和支持需求，识别出恐惧发展和身体感知扭曲等主题。
items.curatedReasonEn: Kinesiophobia post-stroke is a common rehabilitation barrier. This qualitative study provides deep insights into patients' experiences and coping strategies. Clinically, beyond physical function, actively identify and address kinesiophobia, offering psychological support and appropriate education.
items.limitation: 本研究为定性研究，样本量小（15 名卒中幸存者），结果的普遍性有限，主要提供深入的个体经验而非统计学结论。
items.limitationEn: This qualitative study has a small sample size (15 stroke survivors), limiting generalizability; it primarily offers in-depth individual experiences rather than statistical conclusions.

items.title: Validating an Activity Monitor for Acute Care Patients: The Patient/Resident Mobility Tracker (PREEMPT).
items.summary: This study validated the Patient/Resident Mobility Tracker (PREEMPT) activity monitor in 10 healthy older adults and 46 hospitalized patients, comparing its mobility metrics against video truth data and assessing usability.
items.curatedReason: PREEMPT 是一种用于住院患者的活动监测器。如果你正在寻找客观评估住院患者移动性的工具，可以关注这款设备的验证数据，评估其在临床实践中的适用性。
items.titleZh: 验证用于急性期住院患者的活动监测器：患者/居民移动追踪器（PREEMPT）。
items.summaryZh: 这项研究在 10 名健康老年人和 46 名住院患者中验证了 PREEMPT 活动监测器，将其移动指标与视频真实数据进行比较并评估了可用性。
items.curatedReasonEn: PREEMPT is an activity monitor for hospitalized patients. If you are looking for tools to objectively assess mobility in this population, you can review its validation data and assess its applicability in your clinical practice.
items.limitation: 研究样本量较小，且健康老年人与住院患者的比例可能影响结果的外推性。
items.limitationEn: The study has a small sample size, and the proportion of healthy older adults to hospitalized patients may affect the generalizability of results.
items.journal: Physiotherapy research international : the journal for researchers and clinicians in physical therapy

items.title: COMPARISON OF ULTRASOUND-GUIDED LAVAGE AND SUBACROMIAL BURSA INJECTION FOR CALCIFIC TENDINITIS: A PROSPECTIVE, RANDOMIZED, DOUBLE-BLIND TRIAL
items.summary: This prospective, randomized, double-blind trial aimed to compare ultrasound-guided subacromial bursa injection and ultrasound-guided lavage for calcific tendinitis based on clinical and ultrasonographic findings.
items.curatedReason: 超声引导下抽吸灌洗（lavage）和肩峰下滑囊注射（SBI）在钙化性肌腱炎的治疗中均显示出积极效果。这项试验提供了两者在临床和超声表现上比较的证据，你可根据患者具体情况和自身技术选择更合适的方案。
items.titleZh: 超声引导下灌洗与肩峰下滑囊注射治疗钙化性肌腱炎的比较：一项前瞻性、随机、双盲试验
items.curatedReasonEn: Both ultrasound-guided lavage and subacromial bursa injection (SBI) show positive effects in treating calcific tendinitis. This trial provides comparative evidence on their clinical and ultrasonographic outcomes, allowing you to choose the more suitable option based on patient specifics and your expertise.
items.limitation: 研究未提及具体样本量和随访时间，可能影响结果的可靠性和长期有效性。
items.limitationEn: The study did not mention the specific sample size or follow-up period, which may affect the reliability and long-term effectiveness of the results.
items.journal: Archives of Physical Medicine and Rehabilitation

items.title: Neurogenic bowel dysfunction in multiple sclerosis: clinical determinants and its association with bladder dysfunction in a multicenter study.
items.summary: A multicenter, prospective, cross-sectional study of 975 MS patients found moderate-to-severe neurogenic bowel dysfunction (NBD) in 6.8% and identified associations between NBD and bladder dysfunction.
items.curatedReason: 多发性硬化症（MS）患者神经源性肠功能障碍（NBD）的患病率和相关因素。要关注 NBD 与膀胱功能障碍的关联，在评估和管理 MS 患者时，需整合对肠道和膀胱功能的全面评估。
items.titleZh: 多发性硬化症的神经源性肠功能障碍：一项多中心研究的临床决定因素及其与膀胱功能障碍的关联
items.summaryZh: 一项对 975 名多发性硬化症（MS）患者进行的多中心前瞻性横断面研究发现，6.8% 的患者存在中度至重度神经源性肠功能障碍（NBD），并揭示了 NBD 与膀胱功能障碍之间的关联。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study clarifies the prevalence and associated factors of neurogenic bowel dysfunction (NBD) in MS patients. Pay attention to the link between NBD and bladder dysfunction; integrate comprehensive bowel and bladder function assessments when evaluating and managing MS patients.
items.limitation: 横断面研究无法建立因果关系，且受试者来自三级转诊中心，可能存在选择偏倚。
items.limitationEn: Cross-sectional study, unable to establish causality, and potential selection bias from tertiary referral centers.
items.journal: Archives of physical medicine and rehabilitation

related.title: Neurogenic bowel dysfunction in multiple sclerosis: clinical determinants and its association with bladder dysfunction in a multicenter study

items.title: Immersive virtual reality for upper limb rehabilitation in people with MS: a randomised, controlled feasibility study.
items.summary: An eight-week immersive virtual reality (VR) intervention using co-produced games for upper limb rehabilitation in 19 people with MS showed good feasibility and adherence (87%).
items.curatedReason: 沉浸式虚拟现实（VR）游戏用于多发性硬化症（MS）患者上肢康复的可行性研究，招募和依从性均良好。未来大规模 RCT 有望明确其疗效，可在临床考虑作为辅助手段。
items.titleZh: 沉浸式虚拟现实上肢康复在多发性硬化症患者中的随机对照可行性研究
items.summaryZh: 一项为期八周的沉浸式虚拟现实（VR）上肢康复干预在 19 名多发性硬化症患者中显示出良好的可行性（依从性达 87%）。
items.curatedReasonEn: This feasibility study on immersive VR games for upper limb rehabilitation in MS patients showed good recruitment and adherence. Future large-scale RCTs could confirm efficacy; consider it as an adjunctive tool in clinical practice.
items.limitation: 小样本的可行性研究，非旨在评估疗效，结果外推性有限。
items.limitationEn: Small-sample feasibility study, not designed for efficacy, with limited generalizability.

items.title: Mindset, Effort, and Support-the foundation for patients' decision to return to sport after an anterior cruciate ligament injury. A qualitative analysis from the NACOX Cohort.
items.summary: A qualitative analysis of 112 patients from the NACOX Cohort identified mindset, effort, and support as foundational factors determining their decision to return to sport after an ACL injury.
items.curatedReason: 定性分析揭示了 ACL 损伤患者重返运动的决定因素，涵盖心态、努力和支持。在康复过程中，除了生理恢复，还要关注患者的心理动机、治疗依从性以及医护人员和家属的支持，这有助于更全面地支持患者重返运动。
items.titleZh: 心态、努力和支持：ACL 损伤患者重返运动决定的基础——NACOX 队列的定性分析
items.summaryZh: 对 NACOX 队列中 112 名患者进行的定性分析发现，心态、努力和支持是决定 ACL 损伤后患者重返运动的核心因素。
items.curatedReasonEn: Qualitative analysis highlights mindset, effort, and support as key determinants for ACL injury patients returning to sport. In rehabilitation, beyond physical recovery, focus on patients' psychological motivation, treatment adherence, and support from clinicians and family to comprehensively support their return to sport.
items.limitation: 定性研究，样本量虽可观但结论主要为概念性理解，非量化证据。
items.limitationEn: Qualitative study; while the sample size is decent, conclusions are conceptual, not quantitative.

items.curatedReasonEn: Apraxia in patients with cognitive impairment, particularly in familiar tool use, is a key clinical concern. items.title: Better immediate declarative memory is associated with forgetting during locomotor adaptation in chronic stroke and in older adults
items.summary: This study found that better immediate declarative memory is associated with forgetting during locomotor adaptation in chronic stroke patients (n=23) and age-matched older adults (n=21).
items.curatedReason: 慢性卒中患者和老年人在运动适应性学习中存在遗忘现象，且与即时陈述性记忆相关。你在设计运动康复方案时，应考虑如何优化学习策略，以减少遗忘，可能需要更多重复或不同形式的反馈来巩固运动记忆。
items.titleZh: 更好的即时陈述性记忆与慢性卒中和老年人步态适应性遗忘相关

items.curatedReasonEn: Chronic stroke patients and older adults experience forgetting in sensorimotor adaptation, which is associated with immediate declarative memory. When designing motor rehabilitation programs, you should consider optimizing learning strategies to reduce forgetting, potentially requiring more repetition or varied feedback to consolidate motor memory.
items.limitation: 研究为观察性设计，样本量相对较小（卒中组 n=23，对照组 n=21），且为单中心研究，可能影响结果的普遍性。
items.limitationEn: This is an observational study with a relatively small sample size (n=23 for stroke, n=21 for controls) and is a single-center study, potentially affecting the generalizability of the results.

items.title: Establishing weighted criteria for return to play after hamstring injury: a systematic review and methodological quality analysis.

items.title: Shortwave diathermy for managing knee osteoarthritis: A systematic review with meta-analysis.
items.summary: A systematic review and meta-analysis of 17 trials (n=1372) found shortwave diathermy significantly improved pain (mean -2.13; 95% CI [-2.64, -1.62]) and walking ability (mean -0.97; 95% CI [-1.30, -0.65]) for knee osteoarthritis.
items.curatedReason: 这项纳入17项试验（1372名参与者）的系统综述和荟萃分析证实，短波透热疗法（SWD）显著改善了膝骨关节炎（KOA）患者的疼痛（平均-2.13；95% CI [-2.64, -1.62]）和步行能力（平均-0.97；95% CI [-1.30, -0.65]）。如果你的KOA患者对其他干预反应不佳，或作为辅助治疗，SWD值得考虑。
items.titleZh: 短波透热疗法治疗膝骨关节炎：一项系统综述与荟萃分析
items.curatedReasonEn: This systematic review and meta-analysis of 17 trials (1372 participants) confirms that Shortwave Diathermy (SWD) significantly improved pain (mean -2.13; 95% CI [-2.64, -1.62]) and walking ability (mean -0.97; 95% CI [-1.30, -0.65]) in knee osteoarthritis (KOA) patients. If your KOA patients are not responding well to other interventions, or as an adjunctive treatment, SWD is worth considering.
items.limitation: 研究未明确报告疼痛和步行能力改善的临床最小重要差异（MCID），影响临床实践的解读。
items.limitationEn: The study did not explicitly report the Minimum Clinically Important Difference (MCID) for pain and walking ability improvements, which impacts clinical interpretation.

items.title: Cortical activation and functional connectivity during thumb-to-finger opposition in patients with stroke with varying functional levels: insights from fNIRS.

items.titleZh: fNIRS 研究揭示卒中患者在拇指对指任务中，皮层激活和功能连接随功能水平变化
items.curatedReasonEn: This fNIRS study reveals changes in cortical activation patterns and functional connectivity during a thumb-to-finger opposition task in stroke patients, varying with hand function level and dominance. These neurophysiological insights can help you understand cortical reorganization mechanisms at different stages of functional recovery and potentially guide more refined neurorehabilitation strategies.
items.limitation: 研究样本量相对较小（52名患者），且仅限于右利手患者。
items.limitationEn: The study has a relatively small sample size (52 patients) and is limited to right-handed individuals.

items.curatedReason: 亚急性卒中患者，将重复经颅磁刺激（rTMS）应用于背外侧前额叶皮层，可增强双任务训练对活动能力、平衡和认知功能的效果。如果你在管理亚急性卒中患者，考虑将rTMS作为DT训练的辅助手段。
items.titleZh: 重复经颅磁刺激DLPFC可增强亚急性卒中患者双任务训练在活动能力、平衡和认知上的效果：随机对照试验
items.summaryZh: 一项随机对照试验发现，在亚急性卒中患者（30例）的双任务训练中加入背外侧前额叶皮层重复经颅磁刺激（rTMS），可显著增强其双任务活动能力、平衡和认知表现。
items.curatedReasonEn: For sub-acute stroke patients, applying rTMS to the dorsolateral prefrontal cortex can augment dual-task training for mobility, balance, and cognition. If you manage sub-acute stroke, consider rTMS as an adjunct to DT training.
items.limitation: 样本量较小（30名患者），可能限制结果的普适性。
items.limitationEn: The small sample size (30 patients) may limit the generalizability of the results.
items.journal: Physiotherapy research international : the journal for researchers and clinicians in physical therapy

items.title: Healthcare is all in on AI but still grappling with the guardrails
items.summary: The healthcare industry is fully embracing artificial intelligence, but continues to grapple with establishing appropriate guardrails for its implementation and use.
items.curatedReason: 医疗保健领域普遍拥抱AI，但仍在摸索监管边界。你作为PT，需要关注AI工具的临床应用指南和伦理规范，以确保患者安全和数据隐私。
items.titleZh: 医疗保健全面拥抱AI，但仍在摸索监管边界
items.summaryZh: 医疗保健行业正全面拥抱人工智能，但仍在努力为其应用和使用建立适当的监管边界。
items.curatedReasonEn: Healthcare is widely adopting AI, but regulatory guardrails are still evolving. As a PT, you need to stay informed on clinical application guidelines and ethical norms for AI tools to ensure patient safety and data privacy.

items.title: Incremental predictive value of spatiotemporal gait parameters beyond clinical measures for achieving independent outdoor ambulation in subacute stroke patients: A retrospective cohort study.
items.summary: A retrospective cohort study found that spatiotemporal gait parameters offer incremental predictive value beyond clinical measures for achieving independent outdoor ambulation in subacute stroke patients.
items.curatedReason: 在亚急性卒中患者中，步态时空参数在预测独立户外行走能力方面，对传统临床评估（如FAC）具有增量预测价值。这意味着使用步态分析仪能更精细地评估患者的预后，并为康复方案提供更具体的数据支持。
items.titleZh: 亚急性卒中患者步态时空参数在预测独立户外行走能力方面的增量预测价值：一项回顾性队列研究
items.summaryZh: 一项回顾性队列研究发现，在亚急性卒中患者中，步态时空参数在预测独立户外行走能力方面，对传统临床评估具有增量预测价值。
items.curatedReasonEn: In subacute stroke patients, spatiotemporal gait parameters provide incremental predictive value beyond traditional clinical assessments (e.g., FAC) for achieving independent outdoor ambulation. This implies that instrumented gait analysis can offer a more refined prognostic assessment and provide more specific data to guide rehabilitation interventions.
items.limitation: 这是一项回顾性队列研究，可能存在混杂因素和选择偏倚，且仅限于亚急性卒中患者。
items.limitationEn: This is a retrospective cohort study, which may be subject to confounding and selection bias, and is limited to subacute stroke patients.

items.title: Developing a patient decision aid for Femoroacetabular Impingement Syndrome: A mixed-methods study.
items.summary: A mixed-methods study developed and user-tested a patient decision aid for Femoroacetabular Impingement Syndrome (FAIS), aiming to help young, active patients understand the benefits and risks of non-surgical management versus hip arthroscopy.
items.curatedReason: 这份混合方法研究描述了FAIS患者决策辅助工具的开发过程，旨在帮助年轻活跃人群权衡保守治疗与髋关节镜手术的利弊。工具本身尚处于开发和用户测试阶段，但提示了未来患者教育的潜在方向。
items.titleZh: 股骨髋臼撞击综合征患者决策辅助工具的开发：一项混合方法研究
items.summaryZh: 一项混合方法研究开发并用户测试了股骨髋臼撞击综合征（FAIS）的患者决策辅助工具，旨在帮助年轻活跃患者理解非手术管理与髋关节镜手术的潜在益处和风险。
items.curatedReasonEn: This mixed-methods study details the development of a patient decision aid for FAIS, aiming to help young, active individuals weigh the pros and cons of non-surgical management versus hip arthroscopy. While the tool is still in development and user-testing, it suggests a potential direction for future patient education.
items.limitation: 研究仅限于工具的开发和初步用户测试，未评估其临床有效性和长期结果。
items.limitationEn: The study is limited to the development and initial user-testing of the tool, without evaluating its clinical effectiveness or long-term outcomes.

items.title: Inter-rater reliability and construct validity of a cross-diagnostic movement quality score for rehabilitation assessment.
items.summary: A cross-sectional study of 84 hospitalized rehabilitation patients found good inter-rater reliability and construct validity for a Movement Quality Score (MQS) within the Standard Physical Therapy Assessment (SPTA) across neurological, musculoskeletal, and internal medical conditions.
items.curatedReason: 运动质量评分 (MQS) 在住院康复患者中表现出良好的评估者间信度和结构效度，无论患者诊断如何。在跨诊断人群中使用 MQS，你将有更可靠的基线评估工具。
items.titleZh: 跨诊断运动质量评分在康复评估中的评估者间信度和结构效度
items.summaryZh: 一项对 84 名住院康复患者进行的横断面研究发现，标准物理治疗评估 (SPTA) 中的运动质量评分 (MQS) 在神经、肌肉骨骼和内科疾病患者中均表现出良好的评估者间信度和结构效度。
items.curatedReasonEn: The Movement Quality Score (MQS) shows good inter-rater reliability and construct validity across diverse diagnostic groups in inpatient rehabilitation. You'll find MQS a more reliable baseline assessment tool for cross-diagnostic populations.
items.limitation: 研究对象仅限于住院患者，可能限制结果向门诊或社区康复环境的推广。
items.limitationEn: The study was limited to hospitalized patients, which may restrict generalizability to outpatient or community rehabilitation settings.

items.title: Living with spinal cord injury in the community of Bangladesh: a comprehensive analysis using the ICF framework.
items.summary: A cross-sectional study in Bangladesh analyzed functioning, environmental, and personal factors among 773 individuals with spinal cord injury using the ICF framework, providing a comprehensive understanding of community living challenges.
items.curatedReason: 这项在孟加拉国的横断面研究深入分析了社区脊髓损伤患者的功能限制和相关因素，强调了环境和个人因素的关键作用。你可以借鉴 ICF 框架来更全面地评估和干预你所在社区的脊髓损伤患者。
items.titleZh: 孟加拉国社区脊髓损伤患者生活状况：基于 ICF 框架的综合分析
items.summaryZh: 一项在孟加拉国进行的横断面研究，使用 ICF 框架分析了 773 名脊髓损伤患者的功能、环境和个人因素，全面了解了其社区生活面临的挑战。
items.curatedReasonEn: This cross-sectional study in Bangladesh offers an in-depth analysis of functional limitations and associated factors in community-dwelling individuals with spinal cord injury, highlighting the crucial role of environmental and personal factors. You can leverage the ICF framework for a more comprehensive assessment and intervention approach for SCI patients in your community.
items.limitation: 研究为横断面设计，无法建立因果关系，也无法追踪功能限制和因素随时间的变化。
items.limitationEn: The study's cross-sectional design prevents the establishment of causality and cannot track changes in functional limitations and factors over time.

items.title: Implementation and evaluation of a stroke sexual health practice profile for rehabilitation in Ontario, Canada.
items.summary: A Quality Improvement Initiative in Ontario, Canada, successfully implemented and evaluated a structured, team-based approach to integrate sexual health into stroke rehabilitation, using the PLISSIT model and a Stroke Sexual Health Practice Profile.
items.curatedReason: 该研究成功地在加拿大安大略省的卒中康复中整合了性健康实践。在你的实践中，若面临类似患者群体，可以借鉴这种基于团队的结构化方法。
items.titleZh: 在加拿大安大略省实施和评估卒中康复性健康实践规范
items.summaryZh: 加拿大安大略省的一项质量改进倡议成功实施并评估了一种结构化、基于团队的方法，利用 PLISSIT 模型和卒中性健康实践规范，将性健康融入卒中康复。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study successfully integrated sexual health practices into stroke rehabilitation in Ontario, Canada. If you encounter similar patient populations in your practice, you can draw on this team-based, structured approach.
items.limitation: 研究设计为质量改进倡议，缺乏对照组和随机化，可能无法完全归因于干预措施的有效性。
items.limitationEn: The study design was a quality improvement initiative, lacking a control group and randomization, so the effectiveness cannot be fully attributed to the intervention.

items.title: Elevance Health to exit small-group ACA market in 1 state
items.summary: Elevance Health is set to exit the small-group Affordable Care Act (ACA) market in one US state, potentially impacting insurance options for small businesses.
items.curatedReason: Elevance Health 退出俄亥俄州小团体 ACA 市场，这会影响当地小团体医疗保险的可及性和成本。你可能需要关注其对患者转介和报销政策的潜在影响。
items.titleZh: Elevance Health 将退出一州的小团体 ACA 市场
items.summaryZh: Elevance Health 计划退出美国一州的小团体平价医疗法案（ACA）市场，可能影响小企业的保险选择。
items.curatedReasonEn: Elevance Health's exit from the Ohio small-group ACA market will impact the availability and cost of small-group health insurance there. You may need to monitor its potential effects on patient referrals and reimbursement policies.

items.title: Smallest worthwhile effect of anterior cruciate ligament reconstruction compared with non-surgical management: a benefit-harm trade-off study.
items.summary: This study estimated the smallest worthwhile effect of ACL reconstruction followed by rehabilitation versus rehabilitation only, for improving knee function and return to sport, and explored associations with participant characteristics.
items.curatedReason: 韧带重建（ACL）结合康复与单纯康复相比，其膝关节功能改善和重返运动所需的最小效应量已得到估算。这提供了实用的临床决策参考，帮助你与患者沟通手术与非手术治疗的预期效益。
items.titleZh: 前交叉韧带重建与非手术治疗相比的最小有效效应：一项效益-风险权衡研究
items.summaryZh: 这项研究估算了前交叉韧带（ACL）重建结合康复与单纯康复相比，改善膝关节功能和重返运动的最小有效效应，并探讨了与参与者特征的关联。
items.curatedReasonEn: The smallest worthwhile effect of ACL reconstruction plus rehabilitation versus rehabilitation alone for improving knee function and return to sport has been estimated. This provides practical clinical decision-making reference, helping you communicate expected benefits of surgical versus non-surgical treatment with patients.
items.limitation: 研究的 benefit-harm trade-off 评估可能受限于患者偏好和感知风险的个体差异。
items.limitationEn: The benefit-harm trade-off assessment in the study may be limited by individual differences in patient preferences and perceived risks.

items.title: Crossroads in Spinal Cord Injury Treatment: A Multidisciplinary Conference at a Pivotal Moment.
items.summary: The 'Crossroads in Spinal Cord Injury Treatment' conference, held in January 2026, brought together multidisciplinary experts to discuss future directions in SCI care and research.
items.curatedReason: 这次脊髓损伤多学科会议回顾了 SCI 护理和研究的最新方向，为该领域未来发展提供了重要视角。这提示你关注多学科合作和新兴技术对 SCI 康复的潜在影响。
items.titleZh: 脊髓损伤治疗的十字路口：关键时刻的多学科会议
items.summaryZh: 2026年1月在休斯顿举行的一场多学科会议“脊髓损伤治疗的十字路口：现在与未来”汇聚了临床医生、研究人员、工程师和脊髓损伤患者，探讨了脊髓损伤护理和研究的未来方向。
items.curatedReasonEn: This multidisciplinary conference reviewed the latest directions in SCI care and research, offering important perspectives on future developments in the field. This prompts you to pay attention to the potential impact of multidisciplinary collaboration and emerging technologies on SCI rehabilitation.
items.journal: American journal of physical medicine & rehabilitation

items.title: Barriers, facilitators and promising interventions for reducing sedentary behaviour during and after stroke rehabilitation - A scoping review.
items.summary: A scoping review identified barriers, facilitators, and promising behavior change techniques for reducing sedentary behavior during and after stroke rehabilitation.
items.curatedReason: 卒中康复期间及之后减少久坐行为的干预措施仍需改进。这份范围综述识别了潜在的障碍、促进因素和行为改变技术，你在设计康复方案时可以参考这些策略来鼓励患者活动，但需注意目前尚无确切的“最佳”干预方案。
items.titleZh: 卒中康复期间及之后减少久坐行为的障碍、促进因素和有前景干预措施：范围综述
items.summaryZh: 一项范围综述识别了卒中康复期间及之后减少久坐行为的障碍、促进因素和有前景的行为改变技术。
items.curatedReasonEn: Interventions to reduce sedentary behavior during and after stroke rehabilitation need improvement. This scoping review identifies potential barriers, facilitators, and behavior change techniques; you can refer to these strategies to encourage patient activity in your rehabilitation plans, but note there's no definitive 'best' intervention yet.
items.limitation: 范围综述侧重广度而非深度，无法提供具体干预措施的疗效量化数据。
items.limitationEn: The scoping review prioritizes breadth over depth, so it cannot provide quantified efficacy data for specific interventions.

items.title: Rehabilitation and Management in Lateral Medullary Stroke (Wallenberg Syndrome): A Scoping Review and Evidence Map.
items.summary: A scoping review and evidence map provides a comprehensive overview of rehabilitation interventions for lateral medullary stroke (Wallenberg Syndrome), distinguishing direct intervention evidence from management and assessment reports.
items.curatedReason: 这篇范围综述和证据图为外侧延髓卒中（Wallenberg综合征）的康复干预提供了全面的概览。它帮你识别现有证据和知识空白，从而更好地指导临床实践和未来研究方向。
items.titleZh: 外侧延髓卒中（Wallenberg综合征）的康复和管理：范围综述和证据图
items.summaryZh: 一项范围综述和证据图全面概述了外侧延髓卒中（Wallenberg综合征）的康复干预措施，并区分了直接干预证据与管理和评估报告。
items.curatedReasonEn: This scoping review and evidence map provide a comprehensive overview of rehabilitation interventions for lateral medullary stroke (Wallenberg Syndrome). It helps you identify existing evidence and knowledge gaps, guiding clinical practice and future research.
items.limitation: 范围综述的局限在于不进行证据质量评估，因此无法对特定干预措施的有效性给出强推荐。
items.limitationEn: A limitation of scoping reviews is that they do not assess evidence quality, thus precluding strong recommendations for specific interventions.

items.title: Perceptions of Chronic Low Back Pain and Physiotherapy in India: A Qualitative Study.
items.summary: A qualitative study in India identified that chronic low back pain patients face barriers to physiotherapy due to cultural factors like pain stigmatization, over-reliance on analgesics, and low awareness of PT's role.
items.curatedReason: 这项定性研究揭示了印度文化背景下慢性腰痛患者对物理治疗的认知障碍，例如对疼痛的污名化、过度依赖止痛药和缺乏PT意识。了解这些能帮你更好地与患者沟通，降低依从性屏障。
items.titleZh: 印度慢性腰痛患者对物理治疗的认知：一项定性研究
items.summaryZh: 一项在印度的定性研究发现，慢性腰痛患者在寻求物理治疗时面临文化障碍，如疼痛污名化、过度依赖止痛药及对PT作用认知不足。
items.curatedReasonEn: This qualitative study highlights barriers to physiotherapy perception among chronic LBP patients in India, such as pain stigmatization, over-reliance on analgesics, and lack of PT awareness. Understanding these factors can help you improve patient communication and adherence.
items.limitation: 定性研究结果的普遍性受限于特定文化背景。
items.limitationEn: The generalizability of qualitative study findings is limited by specific cultural contexts.
items.journal: Physiotherapy research international : the journal for researchers and clinicians in physical therapy

items.title: Treadmill training with rhythmic auditory cueing and/or visual feedback for persons with Multiple Sclerosis: feasibility and effects on gait parameters in a clinical randomized controlled trial
items.summary: A randomized controlled trial (N=56) found that treadmill training with visual feedback and/or rhythmic auditory cueing was feasible and showed promising effects on gait parameters in persons with Multiple Sclerosis.
items.curatedReason: 这项 RCT 表明，结合视觉反馈和/或节律性听觉提示的跑台训练对多发性硬化症患者的步态参数是可行且有效的。这些辅助手段为多发性硬化症患者的步态训练提供了有前景的策略。
items.titleZh: 节律性听觉提示和/或视觉反馈跑台训练对多发性硬化症患者步态参数的可行性及效果：一项临床随机对照试验。
items.summaryZh: 一项随机对照试验（N=56）发现，结合视觉反馈和/或节律性听觉提示的跑台训练对多发性硬化症患者的步态参数是可行且显示出积极效果。
items.curatedReasonEn: This RCT indicates that treadmill training with visual feedback and/or rhythmic auditory cueing is feasible and effective for gait parameters in Multiple Sclerosis patients. These adjuncts offer promising strategies for gait training in MS.
items.limitation: 该研究为临床可行性试验，样本量（N=56）较小，且主要关注短期步态参数，长期功能改善仍需进一步验证。
items.limitationEn: This is a clinical feasibility trial with a small sample size (N=56), primarily focusing on short-term gait parameters; long-term functional improvement requires further validation.

items.title: Barriers and Trends to Early Mobilization in Children With a Traumatic Brain Injury.
items.summary: A retrospective cohort study identified common barriers to early mobility in pediatric ICU patients with traumatic brain injury, including sedation, mechanical ventilation, and medical instability.
items.curatedReason: 对于儿童创伤性脑损伤患者，早期活动面临多种障碍，包括镇静和通气。你在设计康复方案时，应识别并尽可能解决这些可控因素，以促进更早的活动。
items.titleZh: 创伤性脑损伤儿童早期活动中的障碍与趋势
items.summaryZh: 一项回顾性队列研究描述了儿童创伤性脑损伤患者在儿科ICU中早期活动的情况，并识别了镇静、机械通气等主要障碍。
items.curatedReasonEn: Early mobilization for children with traumatic brain injury faces multiple barriers, including sedation and ventilation. When designing rehabilitation protocols, you should identify and, where possible, address these modifiable factors to facilitate earlier activity.
items.limitation: 这是一项回顾性单中心研究，结果可能受到选择偏倚的影响，且外推性有限。
items.limitationEn: This retrospective single-center study may be subject to selection bias and has limited generalizability.
items.journal: American journal of physical medicine & rehabilitation

items.title: Innovative technologies for gait rehabilitation in incomplete spinal cord injury: A systematic review and meta-analysis.
items.summary: A systematic review and meta-analysis synthesized current evidence on technological interventions for gait rehabilitation in adults with incomplete spinal cord injury, highlighting their efficacy.
items.curatedReason: 这项系统综述和荟萃分析强调了创新技术在不完全脊髓损伤（iSCI）步态康复中的潜力。在为 iSCI 患者设计康复方案时，你可以优先考虑整合这些有强证据支持的技术，以优化步态功能恢复。
items.titleZh: 不完全脊髓损伤步态康复中的创新技术：系统综述和荟萃分析
items.summaryZh: 一项系统综述和荟萃分析综合了不完全脊髓损伤成人步态康复中技术干预的现有证据，强调了其有效性。
items.curatedReasonEn: This systematic review and meta-analysis highlights the potential of innovative technologies in gait rehabilitation for incomplete spinal cord injury (iSCI). When designing rehabilitation protocols for iSCI patients, prioritize integrating these strongly evidenced technologies to optimize gait function recovery.
items.limitation: 不同技术类型、患者特征和随访时间上的异质性较高，限制了某些具体干预措施的普适性推荐。
items.limitationEn: High heterogeneity in technology types, patient characteristics, and follow-up durations limits the generalizability of specific intervention recommendations.
items.journal: PM & R : the journal of injury, function, and rehabilitation

items.title: Two-Year Outcomes of the Proximal Hamstring Avulsion Rehabilitation Regimes: Longitudinal Versus Accelerated Protocol (PHARRLAP) Study: A Randomized Controlled Trial.
items.summary: A randomized controlled trial with 2-year follow-up found that an accelerated rehabilitation protocol was non-inferior to a longitudinal protocol for proximal hamstring avulsion repair, with similar clinical outcomes, strength, and functional symmetry.
items.curatedReason: 这项 RCT 的两年随访数据证实，加速康复方案在近端腘绳肌撕脱伤术后恢复中，与传统方案相比在临床结局、力量和功能对称性上具有非劣效性。这为你提供了更早介入主动康复的证据支持。
items.titleZh: 近端腘绳肌撕脱伤康复方案的两年结局：纵向与加速方案（PHARRLAP）研究：一项随机对照试验
items.summaryZh: 一项为期两年的随机对照试验显示，加速康复方案在近端腘绳肌撕脱伤修复后，与纵向方案在临床结局、力量和功能对称性方面无显著差异。
items.curatedReasonEn: Two-year follow-up data from this RCT confirm that an accelerated rehabilitation protocol is non-inferior to traditional protocols in clinical outcomes, strength, and functional symmetry after proximal hamstring avulsion repair. This provides evidence to support earlier active rehabilitation.
items.limitation: 研究对象主要为运动员，其依从性和康复能力可能高于一般人群，结果外推需谨慎。
items.limitationEn: The study subjects were primarily athletes, whose adherence and rehabilitation capabilities might be higher than the general population, so results should be extrapolated with caution.
items.journal: The American journal of sports medicine

items.title: Physical Therapy Management of Children With Developmental Coordination Disorder: A 2026 Evidence-Based Clinical Practice Guideline from the American Physical Therapy Association Academy of Pediatric Physical Therapy

items.title: American Academy of Orthopaedic Surgeons: Management of Rotator Cuff Injuries Clinical Practice Guideline
items.curatedReason: 美国骨科医师学会发布了肩袖损伤管理临床实践指南。作为物理治疗师，理解这份指南将帮助你更好地与骨科医生协作，优化肩袖损伤患者的综合管理。
items.titleZh: 美国骨科医师学会：肩袖损伤管理临床实践指南。
items.summaryZh: 美国骨科医师学会发布了肩袖损伤管理的临床实践指南。
items.curatedReasonEn: The American Academy of Orthopaedic Surgeons has published clinical practice guidelines for the management of rotator cuff injuries. As a physical therapist, understanding these guidelines will help you collaborate more effectively with orthopedic surgeons and optimize comprehensive management for patients with rotator cuff injuries.

items.title: Global Strategy for Prevention, Diagnosis, and Management of COPD
items.curatedReason: 这是一项关于 COPD 预防、诊断和管理的全球策略指南。虽然不是直接的物理治疗指南，但了解这些宏观策略有助于你将物理治疗干预与整体管理框架相结合。
items.titleZh: COPD 预防、诊断和管理全球策略。
items.summaryZh: 这是一项关于慢性阻塞性肺疾病（COPD）预防、诊断和管理的全球策略指南。
items.curatedReasonEn: This is a global strategy guideline for the prevention, diagnosis, and management of COPD. While not a direct physiotherapy guideline, understanding these macro strategies helps you integrate physiotherapy interventions within the overall management framework.

items.title: Prescribing Exercise and Designing Physical Activity Programs for People With Disabilities
items.curatedReason: 这项指南关注为残疾人开具运动处方和设计身体活动方案。它提醒你在评估残疾患者时，不仅要关注功能受限，更要积极融入运动和身体活动以改善其整体健康和生活质量。
items.titleZh: 为残疾人开具运动处方和设计身体活动方案。
items.summaryZh: 此指南提供了为残疾人开具运动处方和设计身体活动方案的建议。
items.curatedReasonEn: This guideline focuses on prescribing exercise and designing physical activity programs for people with disabilities. It reminds you that when assessing patients with disabilities, you should not only focus on functional limitations but also actively integrate exercise and physical activity to improve their overall health and quality of life.

items.title: 2025 Guideline for the Prevention, Detection, Evaluation and Management of High Blood Pressure in Adults

items.curatedReasonEn: The 2025 Guideline for the Prevention, Detection, Evaluation and Management of High Blood Pressure in Adults has been released. While primarily for physicians, understanding these guidelines helps you better identify risks in hypertensive patients and advise on exercise and lifestyle interventions during rehabilitation.
